project.description: Job1 - Build: PHP lint and Docker image (equalvoice-app)

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -eux
bash /var/jenkins_home/ci-scripts/jenkins-checkout.sh
echo "======================================" echo "Job1 - EqualVoice Build #${BUILD_NUMBER}" echo "======================================"
export IMAGE_NAME="equalvoice-app" export IMAGE_TAG="${BUILD_NUMBER}" export GIT_COMMIT_SHORT="$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" export GIT_BRANCH="$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo main)"
echo "Git: ${GIT_BRANCH} @ ${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT}"
echo "Step 1: PHP lint..." docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -w /app php:8.1-cli \ sh -c "find . -name '*.php' -not -path './vendor/*' -not -path './.git/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l"
echo "Step 2: Docker build..." docker build \ --build-arg BUILD_DATE="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" \ --build-arg VCS_REF="${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT}" \ --build-arg BUILD_VERSION="${BUILD_NUMBER}" \ --tag "${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}" \ --tag "${IMAGE_NAME}:latest" \ --label "build.number=${BUILD_NUMBER}" \ --label "git.commit=${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT}" \ --label "git.branch=${GIT_BRANCH}" \ .
docker images | grep "${IMAGE_NAME}" | head -5 echo "Build OK - ${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"
